title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 285.125 - Reduced health care premiums for nonsmokers permitted
text:
285.125.  Reduced health care premiums for nonsmokers permitted. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, an employer shall be permitted to provide or contract for health insurance benefits at a reduced premium rate for employees who do not smoke or use tobacco products.
(L. 2005 H.B. 596)
